LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD WAS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; NOTICE OF NON-APPEARANCE PURSUANT TO CRC 321(C); MEMO OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF COUNSEL IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; JUDGMENT & ORDERE CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD SERVED APR-27-2006, MAIL AS TO RESPONDENT ESPINOZA, SHARON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, SHARON $3,114.52 PRINCIPAL, $421.53 INTEREST, $265.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,801.05, SEE SCANNED DOC
